hooks.command: cd /path/to/unifi && ./scripts/unifi_snapshot.sh 2>/dev/null || echo 'UniFi snapshot failed — controller may be unreachable'

cd /path/to/unifi && source local/devices.sh && echo "CRITICAL STATE — preserve through compaction:
- iPad fish_tank MAC: $IPAD_FISH_TANK | fish_tank2 MAC: $IPAD_FISH_TANK2
- Scripts in scripts/ dir, skills in .claude/skills/
- Use /unifi-status, /unifi-debug, /unifi-find-ipad, /unifi-ap-health, /unifi-client-history"
file_path=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$file_path" == *.sh ]]; then shellcheck "$file_path" 2>&1 || true; fi
